docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT NICHOLAS DUEBER IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS CLARA VO. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT ALI SHAKOORI IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2021 - JUDGMENT.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SHAKOORI, ALI AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DUEBER, NICHOLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT - FEE FOR SERVICE $110.00 SERVED FEB-27-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DUEBER, NICHOLAS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2021 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SHAKOORI, ALI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DUEBER, NICHOLAS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUEBER, NICHOLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAKOORI, ALI $6,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,390.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DUEBER, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT SHAKOORI, ALI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUEBER, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT SHAKOORI, ALI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED "C-19" SERVED NOV-14-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAKOORI, ALI
